Btl_CP_010_Intro_1_011010.Text: I'll take care of this one!

Btl_CP_010_Intro_1_021010.Text: Sorry, but I didn't come here to lose!

Btl_CP_010_Intro_2_031010.Text: As long as I'm here, we've got this.

Btl_CP_010_Intro_3_051010.Text: What are you going to teach me?

Btl_CP_010_Intro_3_052010.Text: If Gojo's here, there's nothing to be afraid of!

Btl_CP_010_Intro_3_032010.Text: Hehe. In that case, let's win.

Btl_CP_010_Victory_2_011010.Text: Mm-hmm. Have I got moves or what?

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_091010.Text: Why are you teaching me all these things?

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_092010.Text: I'm certain I can win your respect.

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_093010.Text: I'm glad I could help, Nanami.

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_051010.Text: Gojo! How did I do? See my moves?

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_052010.Text: I feel like I'm getting stronger than before!

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_053010.Text: That means a lot coming from you, Gojo.

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_054010.Text: With you?! I wonder if I'll survive that...

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_031010.Text: You rock, Fushiguro. You're such a pro.

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_041020.Text: I don't eat that kind of food!

Btl_CP_020_Intro_1_011010.Text: Magnificent. A complete and total slaughter.

Btl_CP_020_Intro_1_021010.Text: I'm about to kill you just for the hell of it.

Btl_CP_020_Victory_2_021010.Text: Whether you live or die is of no consequence to me.

Btl_CP_030_Intro_1_011010.Text: Sorry, I don't have much time.

Btl_CP_030_Intro_1_021010.Text: And so, I save people unequally.

Btl_CP_030_Intro_2_031010.Text: I don't have time for this.

Btl_CP_030_Intro_3_054010.Text: Well, I guess beggars can't be choosers.

Btl_CP_030_Intro_3_062010.Text: Maki, as a Sorcerer, what kind of people do you want to save?

Btl_CP_030_Intro_3_011010.Text: I don't want to lose either.

Btl_CP_030_Victory_3_042010.Text: Okay, I'll go report to Ijichi.

Btl_CP_030_Victory_3_051010.Text: Feels like I'm getting stronger, little by little.

Btl_CP_030_Victory_3_053010.Text: I'm seriously going to punch you...

Btl_CP_030_Victory_3_054010.Text: I'd rather not admit it, but I have to thank you, Gojo.

Btl_CP_030_Victory_3_061010.Text: Still plenty of room for improvement...

Btl_CP_030_Victory_3_063010.Text: If you're gonna complain, complain to Gojo.

Btl_CP_030_TagSpAtk_1_011010.Text: I don't have time for this.

Btl_CP_040_Intro_1_011010.Text: If you're not coming, then I am.

Btl_CP_040_Intro_2_011010.Text: Let's knock this out and grab some sushi in Ginza.

Btl_CP_040_Intro_2_021010.Text: No dragging your heels. Let's get this show on the road.

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_033010.Text: Who do you think you're talking to? I've got this.

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_034010.Text: No problem. You strike from behind.

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_051010.Text: I'll show you what I can do.

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_052010.Text: We've got the ultimate Sorcerer on our side: Satoru Gojo!

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_053010.Text: Never thought I'd see his abilities with my own eyes...

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_061010.Text: You know, I really respect you, Maki.

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_062010.Text: Throw yourselves on the ground, punks! Maki's coming through!

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_063010.Text: You got it! Time to fill 'em full of holes!

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_064010.Text: Allow me to help you out!

Btl_CP_040_Victory_1_011010.Text: Show a bit more guts, why don't you?

Btl_CP_040_Victory_2_021010.Text: As if I was gonna lose.

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_031010.Text: Ha! You're no match for us!

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_032010.Text: Let me pet your dog next time, Fushiguro.

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_033010.Text: Pah, do I look hurt to you? Honestly.

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_051010.Text: Girl of Steel, Nobara Kugisaki here.

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_054010.Text: ...Not happening. It's just too far out there.

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_061010.Text: Now you know why Maki's gonna be the next top Sorcerer!

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_062010.Text: You're gonna be an amazing Sorcerer for sure, Maki!

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_063010.Text: I can't stack up to you, Maki!

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_064010.Text: You'll regret taking us on if that's all you've got!

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_011010.Text: Fighting barehanded? You put lead in your food or something?!

Btl_CP_050_Intro_1_021010.Text: Sure, we can fight if you want. I'll win, though.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_2_011010.Text: A fun time in hell awaits.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_2_021010.Text: You'll be fine. Just stay close to me.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_2_031010.Text: Never fear. Yours truly is here.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_011010.Text: I'll train you to be even stronger than me.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_012010.Text: Yuji, show what you've really got and give everyone a surprise!

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_013010.Text: I'm going to teach you the most powerful Jujutsu.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_014010.Text: Leave it to me. I'm too strong for them.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_031010.Text: I'll be watching from the wings, Megumi. I'll leave the beatdown to you.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_032010.Text: Well, this is a rare treat! It's not everyday you wanna fight with me, Megumi.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_033010.Text: If I do, it'll be over just like that.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_034010.Text: I'm always ready and raring to go.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_041010.Text: I'll show you what it means to be the strongest.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_042010.Text: Let's wrap this up, grab Yuji and Megumi on the way back then grab some grub!

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_043010.Text: You're just itching for a fight, aren't you? Can't wait to see what you've got.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_044010.Text: Yeah, what she said! I'm the strongest!

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_111010.Text: Do be careful now, and try not to die.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_112010.Text: Be sure to watch my fight and learn from it.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_113010.Text: Right, time to show me how much you've grown.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_114010.Text: That's the spirit. First, I'll put you through your paces.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_091010.Text: Howdy, folks! This is Kento Nanami, suit turned Sorcerer.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_4_011010.Text: I think I'll show off a little.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_1_011010.Text: I told you, didn't I? I'm the strongest.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_2_011010.Text: I'm going to let you off the hook with just this.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_2_021010.Text: Another win wrapped up, now let's go eat!

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_011010.Text: You've improved by leaps and bounds, Yuji.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_012010.Text: You've improved enough to spar with me now.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_013010.Text: Could've been worse, that's for sure.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_014010.Text: Goes to show what a good teacher you've got.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_032010.Text: You've gotten kind of roughed up, kid. I'll show the second-years.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_033010.Text: Thanks to my guidance, of course?

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_034010.Text: Oh yeah, I've got some business to attend to. Handle the report, would you?

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_042010.Text: This is my Jujutsu. Feel free to use it as a reference point.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_043010.Text: I'm Satoru Gojo, the strongest Jujutsu Sorcerer!

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_044010.Text: Very nice. Just what I expect from a student.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_111010.Text: You broken the ice with the Jujutsu High guys yet?

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_112010.Text: That was my Jujutsu. Well? Think it'll be a useful reference?

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_113010.Text: Good work out there. Really put your nose to the grindstone.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_114010.Text: I can see how you've grown. Have a bit more faith in yourself!

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_092010.Text: I'll leave the report to you!

Btl_CP_050_SpAtk_1_013010.Text: This is the inner world of Limitless.

Btl_CP_050_SpAtk_1_015010.Text: Every act in life is repeated infinitely, over and over.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_1_011010.Text: Don't think I'll let you off easy.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_1_021010.Text: Land a blow on me. I dare you.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_031010.Text: Let's take this jerk down first. Save the talk for afterward.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_032010.Text: Don't you dare lose Playful Cloud, Megumi.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_033010.Text: Sheesh, pretty cocky for an underclassman! Fine, it's all you!

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_034010.Text: What difference would it make to me whether my actions save anyone?

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_042010.Text: I'll make those assholes at home blubber at my newfound strength.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_043010.Text: Is that right? Well come on, let's do this!

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_044010.Text: ...Knock it off. Keep the fluff to a minimum.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_071010.Text: I'll go first, Toge. Back me up.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_082010.Text: What happened to the Cursed Tool, Panda?

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_083010.Text: Do you even have to ask? Let's go.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_084010.Text: Yep. Glad you're up for this.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_111010.Text: Don't get distracted, idiot. We've got a fight!

Btl_CP_060_Victory_1_011010.Text: Geez, were they weak or what...

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_031010.Text: Sheesh, they give me all the annoying jobs.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_032010.Text: Yo, Megumi, don't tell me this is enough to faze you.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_033010.Text: You have too many wasteful moves. We'll beat that out of you when we get back.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_041010.Text: Looks like you know how to hold your own, Nobara.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_042010.Text: These guys don't look up to much.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_043010.Text: I told you to knock it off, dammit!

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_071010.Text: Heh, you're no match for us.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_072010.Text: Our work here is done, Toge.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_074010.Text: I got it, I got it. What a nag.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_081010.Text: Someone put up a real fight, already.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_082010.Text: Done already? Not as tough as I expected.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_083010.Text: You laughing at me? I'll murder you, ya mangy musteloid!

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_084010.Text: Pampering ain't the same as kindness, man.

Btl_CP_060_TagAtk_1_011010.Text: You made a huge miscalculation here.

Btl_CP_070_Intro_2_031010.Text: Mustard leaf, salmon roe, tuna mayo.

Btl_CP_080_Intro_1_011010.Text: Sorry, but I'm not in the mood to hand you a win.

Btl_CP_080_Intro_1_021010.Text: You ever seen a Panda fight?

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_061010.Text: Let's show our juniors how it's done.

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_062010.Text: Hey, Maki. You ready for this?

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_063010.Text: Okie dokie. I'll handle this, then.

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_064010.Text: I'm merely panda. No understand human speak.

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_111010.Text: Yuta here ain't gonna let you get away with that.

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_112010.Text: I'm counting on ya, ol' buddy, ol' pal.

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_113010.Text: You're too tense, man. Relax those shoulders.

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_114010.Text: Now this is a guy I can rely on.

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_071010.Text: Hey, Toge. You ready for this?

Btl_CP_080_Victory_1_011010.Text: Like a walk in the park!

Btl_CP_080_Victory_3_061010.Text: Hey Maki, you seemed to have waaay more fun fighting with Yuta.

Btl_CP_080_Victory_3_062010.Text: You know, I've been thinking... We oughta be a little nicer to the first-years, yeah?

Btl_CP_080_Victory_3_064010.Text: Whaddya expect? They went up against us.

Btl_CP_080_Victory_3_113010.Text: Nahhh, that ain't it. You worked your butt off, Yuta.

Btl_CP_080_Victory_3_114010.Text: I may be Panda, but that don't mean I'm a panda!

Btl_CP_080_Victory_3_071020.Text: How're things on your end, Toge?

Btl_CP_080_Victory_3_072020.Text: Good, then let's head on back.

Btl_CP_090_Intro_1_011010.Text: The accumulation of those little moments of despair in life is what make you an adult.

Btl_CP_090_Intro_1_021010.Text: I hate putting in overtime if I don't have to. So, let's finish this quickly.

Btl_CP_090_Intro_3_011010.Text: Are you ready for this, Itadori?

Btl_CP_090_Intro_3_013010.Text: I'm not a teacher, so please don't call me that.

Btl_CP_090_Intro_3_014010.Text: Do you have to call me that?

Btl_CP_090_Intro_3_051010.Text: Please don't ever call me that.

Btl_CP_090_Intro_3_051020.Text: Gojo, I'm leaving them to you.

Btl_CP_090_Victory_1_011010.Text: I despise those who don't conduct themselves seriously.

Btl_CP_090_Victory_2_011010.Text: I adhere to facts and judge on that basis. That's who I am.

Btl_CP_090_Victory_2_021010.Text: The overtime shift ends at last.

Btl_CP_090_Victory_3_012010.Text: Now I see why Gojo brought him to me.

Btl_CP_090_Victory_3_013010.Text: Gojo has entrusted me with teaching you, so I have no choice.

Btl_CP_090_Victory_3_014010.Text: Go sell that to the higher ups, not to me.

Btl_CP_090_Victory_3_051020.Text: We're done here. Let's get back.

Btl_CP_090_Victory_3_052020.Text: You need to do it too, Gojo.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_1_021010.Text: The word "defeat" has no place in my mind!

Btl_CP_100_Intro_2_011010.Text: Can you at least rise to fight me?

Btl_CP_100_Intro_2_021010.Text: I'll show you the way to victory!

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_012010.Text: Now, what do you say you and I get cooking?

Btl_CP_100_Victory_2_021010.Text: I thought that would be way more fun.

Btl_CP_110_Intro_1_021010.Text: I want to be strong and determined.

Btl_CP_110_Intro_3_052010.Text: I'm a student at Jujutsu High, and I'll be the one to break Rika's curse!

Btl_CP_110_Intro_3_072010.Text: I'll definitely repay your kindness, Inumaki!

Btl_CP_110_Intro_3_084010.Text: Yeah! I'll take care of it!

Btl_CP_110_Intro_3_061020.Text: Y-yes! I'll do my best, Maki!

Btl_CP_110_Victory_2_011010.Text: I'll never forgive anyone who harms my friends.

Btl_CP_110_Victory_2_021010.Text: Glad I won in the end...

Btl_CP_110_Victory_3_052010.Text: I guess I've kind of got the hang of Curses now.

Btl_CP_110_Victory_3_054010.Text: I...didn't really get what was happening...

Btl_CP_110_Victory_3_081010.Text: It's thanks to you that we won, Panda.

Btl_CP_110_Victory_3_082010.Text: A panda that can also turn into a gorilla...

Btl_CP_110_Victory_3_084010.Text: I'm glad to hear you say that...

Btl_CP_110_Victory_3_061010.Text: I want to be like you, Maki.

Btl_CP_110_Victory_3_062010.Text: I want to be strong and determined!

Btl_CP_120_Intro_1_011010.Text: Let us freely curse each other to the death.

Btl_CP_120_Intro_1_021010.Text: I'm going to use my full force to kill you, now.

Btl_CP_120_Victory_2_011010.Text: What I long for isn't any kind of enlightenment. It's a chosen people.

Btl_CP_120_SpAtk_1_011010.Text: Cursed Spirit Manipulation: Supreme Art Maelstrom.

Btl_CP_120_SpAtk_1_012010.Text: I'm going to use my full force to kill you, now.

Btl_CP_130_Intro_1_011010.Text: Let's be cunning, as Curses should. And humans should.

Btl_CP_130_Intro_2_021010.Text: You poor thing. There'll be nothing left of you once we're done.

Btl_CP_130_Intro_2_031010.Text: Isn't being driven by desire what makes a Curse a Curse?

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_141010.Text: Let's compete to see who gets the first kill.

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_142010.Text: Don't end up as a severed head this time, Jogo.

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_143010.Text: Our mission is important, of course, but let's enjoy the moment.

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_144010.Text: Of course, I have a lot of stock ready.

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_151010.Text: You should enjoy battle much more than you do.

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_152010.Text: I'm so pissed off. Let's rip 'em to pieces!

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_153010.Text: Good to hear, Hanami. That's how a Curse should be!

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_154010.Text: Cool. Let's enjoy the fight together.

Btl_CP_130_Victory_2_021010.Text: You helped make that a successful experiment.

Btl_CP_130_Victory_3_141010.Text: Well done, Jogo! Was that fun for you?

Btl_CP_130_Victory_3_142010.Text: Glad to see you're okay, Jogo... Unlike last time.

Btl_CP_130_Victory_3_143010.Text: Don't you admire my work? I've been experimenting every day.

Btl_CP_130_Victory_3_144010.Text: Absolutely. You should be too, Jogo.

Btl_CP_130_Victory_3_151010.Text: Solo's fine, but combat's more fun in a group.

Btl_CP_130_Victory_3_153010.Text: Seems you understand at last, Hanami.

Btl_CP_130_Victory_3_154010.Text: You're sounding more like a Curse every day, Hanami.

Btl_CP_140_Intro_1_021010.Text: This'll be little more than a formality.

Btl_CP_140_Intro_2_011010.Text: We Curses are the true humans.

Btl_CP_140_Intro_2_021010.Text: Surely you don't expect to triumph over us.

Btl_CP_140_Intro_2_031010.Text: This won't even be a contest.

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_131010.Text: Are you ready for this, Mahito?

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_132010.Text: The era of Curses is nigh.

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_133010.Text: Don't be absurd. You wouldn't stand a chance.

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_134010.Text: Be silent, or you will burn too!

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_151010.Text: I assume you're fully prepared, Hanami?

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_152010.Text: I owe you a favor, so speak up if you need anything.

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_153010.Text: You don't need to tell me that.

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_154010.Text: Of course. We're in a different class to them.

Btl_CP_140_Victory_1_011010.Text: People like you are powerless before me.

Btl_CP_140_Victory_2_011010.Text: That was easier than I expected.

Btl_CP_140_Victory_2_021010.Text: They weren't up to much in the end.

Btl_CP_140_Victory_3_131010.Text: I see you've been busy, Mahito.

Btl_CP_140_Victory_3_133010.Text: Bah, there's no enjoyment in frying weaklings.

Btl_CP_140_Victory_3_151010.Text: Not long now until the era of Curses dawns.

Btl_CP_140_Victory_3_153010.Text: This is not a battle. This is nothing more than one-sided devastation.

Btl_CP_140_Victory_3_154010.Text: The truth is, only death can reveal our strength.

Btl_CP_140_TagSpAtk_1_131010.Text: You don't get to give orders.

Btl_CP_150_Intro_1_011010.Text: I merely wish to protect this planet, that's all.

Btl_CP_150_Intro_2_021010.Text: Will you lend me your strength?

Btl_CP_150_Intro_3_131010.Text: I'm going to savor this battle, Mahito.

Btl_CP_150_Intro_3_132010.Text: I, too, have come to understand the joys and pleasures of battle.

Btl_CP_150_Intro_3_133010.Text: You certainly seem to be relishing this.

Btl_CP_150_Intro_3_134010.Text: That will be easy with my Cursed Technique.

Btl_CP_150_Intro_3_144010.Text: You don't need to worry about such things.

Btl_CP_150_Victory_1_011010.Text: You are nothing before the power of the earth.

Btl_CP_150_Victory_2_011010.Text: It seems your abilities are rather limited.

Btl_CP_150_Victory_2_021010.Text: Become a part of the planet.

Btl_CP_150_Victory_3_131010.Text: So, this is the joy of battle...

Btl_CP_150_Victory_3_132010.Text: Restraining one's desire to kill only builds up stress.

Btl_CP_150_Victory_3_133010.Text: You truly do love to fight, don't you.

Btl_CP_150_Victory_3_142010.Text: Jogo, are you enjoying the fighting?

Btl_CP_150_Victory_3_143010.Text: Yes, and when it comes, the planet will be restored to its former state.

Btl_CP_150_TagAtk_1_011010.Text: Be grateful to nature in your last moments.

Btl_CP_150_SpAtk_1_011010.Text: I'll stop you in your tracks!

Btl_CP_160_Intro_1_011010.Text: This is a warning. If you see my back, I'll be forced to kill.

Btl_CP_160_Intro_1_021010.Text: Now run away. Turn your back.

Btl_CP_160_Victory_1_011010.Text: Today's opponent was no match for us, elder brother.

Btl_CP_160_Victory_2_011010.Text: Now I'll return to my elder brother.

Btl_CP_160_TagAtk_1_011010.Text: This is the power of brothers.

Btl_CP_010_Intro_3_241010.Text: Man, your axe is just so cool!

Btl_CP_010_Intro_3_243010.Text: Cool! I'll go all-out from the start!

Btl_CP_010_Intro_3_244010.Text: Yeah! Just you watch me, Mei Mei!

Btl_CP_010_Intro_3_231010.Text: You're on our side now, right?!

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_241010.Text: I've still got room to grow, Mei Mei.

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_242010.Text: Think I've gotten a bit stronger, too?

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_243010.Text: Yeah! I won't lose, no matter how many times we do this!

Btl_CP_010_Victory_3_244010.Text: No sweat! I can still fight!

Btl_CP_030_Intro_3_192010.Text: Time to get serious and focus.

Btl_CP_030_Intro_3_193010.Text: I don't plan on being left behind.

Btl_CP_030_Intro_3_194010.Text: Nope, you sure know how to say scary things.

Btl_CP_030_Victory_3_191010.Text: Well, looks like we both have room for improvement.

Btl_CP_030_Victory_3_192010.Text: Hey Kamo, still good on blood? We'll save you if you pass out.

Btl_CP_030_Victory_3_193010.Text: I know. I won't get stronger if I get complacent.

Btl_CP_030_Victory_3_194010.Text: I'll be stronger for the next time!

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_172010.Text: I'll wrap all this up and be done with you.

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_174010.Text: Why do you have to talk down to me?!

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_183010.Text: What's with that high and mighty attitude?!

Btl_CP_040_Intro_3_184010.Text: I suppose I'll let you help me out, Momo.

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_171010.Text: This is what happens when you underestimate me.

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_172010.Text: Finally, over and done with. Let's go make our report.

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_173010.Text: Hey! Who said you could take all the credit?!

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_182010.Text: Hey. Let me hitch a ride on that broom.

Btl_CP_040_Victory_3_184010.Text: You sure put me through my paces.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_211010.Text: I'm strong, you see. This won't take long.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_212010.Text: I'm a busy man, you know. Let's get this over with.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_213010.Text: By all means! I don't plan on losing.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_214010.Text: Come on, loosen up. Let's just play it by ear.

Btl_CP_050_Intro_3_241010.Text: Heh. I'll get this done in no time.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_211010.Text: Looks like I overdid it a little. Ah well!

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_212010.Text: Sorry to ask, but can I leave the rest to you?

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_213010.Text: Why, thank you. You were pretty tough there yourself.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_214010.Text: It'd be pretty lame if this was enough to beat us.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_241010.Text: Too bad you had Mei as your opponent.

Btl_CP_050_Victory_3_242010.Text: I'd say I'm a pretty nice guy.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_173010.Text: Call me big sis, why don't you?

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_174010.Text: You can talk like that after you land a hit on me, Mai.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_211010.Text: I know you've got my back.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_212010.Text: If you're scared, I can handle this myself, y'know?

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_213010.Text: You seriously saying that now? Come on, let's do this!

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_214010.Text: Don't let anyone take that blade from you again, you hear?

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_271010.Text: Step up or go home, old man.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_272010.Text: Huh, I bet I could take these guys on my own.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_273010.Text: Please, like I'd let a stinking drunk outdo me.

Btl_CP_060_Intro_3_274010.Text: Like you're one to talk, old man.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_171010.Text: Nice backup. I'll need the same from you next time.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_173010.Text: Heh, you think that's enough to break me?

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_174010.Text: I still think we were a pretty good match, Mai.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_211010.Text: Smooth moves out there. Next one's in the bag.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_212010.Text: You've got some good techniques, after all.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_213010.Text: This isn't enough to send us packing.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_214010.Text: Go put the work in to surpass me, then. I'll train you when you get back.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_272010.Text: I can win even with a drunkard like this on my side.

Btl_CP_060_Victory_3_274010.Text: Big mouth for someone who isn't even trying.

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_221010.Text: Well, us Cursed Corpses oughta get along!

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_223010.Text: What, don't you want to team up with me?

Btl_CP_080_Intro_3_224010.Text: Let's get this over with, already.

Btl_CP_080_Victory_3_221010.Text: We make a pretty good duo, huh?

Btl_CP_080_Victory_3_222010.Text: Huh, we work better than I figured we would.

Btl_CP_080_Victory_3_223010.Text: Would it kill you just to say I did good normally?

Btl_CP_080_Victory_3_224010.Text: Come on, I wasn't exactly sitting on my hands, either.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_171010.Text: I, Aoi Todo, will take you on.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_173010.Text: I appreciate the enthusiasm, but too much will take us nowhere.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_174010.Text: Focus on the enemy in front of you, Mai.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_181010.Text: Time to do whatever I want!

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_182010.Text: I'll do this my way, got it?

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_183010.Text: Doesn't matter who I'm up against. I won't lose.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_184010.Text: No point in throwing down with a wimp like that.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_191010.Text: Let's win this fight. Give it all you've got!

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_192010.Text: I could handle this all on my own! Hope you're ready!

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_193010.Text: Got a problem? Then come on!

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_194010.Text: Don't tell me what to do! I'll fight how I want!

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_211010.Text: Heh. Time to get serious. Follow my lead!

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_212010.Text: I bet I could do this on my own, no sweat.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_213010.Text: Just follow my lead. That's it.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_214010.Text: Push all pointless thoughts from your noggin if you want to win.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_221010.Text: Let's go! There isn't an opponent we can't beat!

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_222010.Text: Hah. Looks pretty boring, don't you think?

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_224010.Text: Humph, that depends on the opponent.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_241010.Text: Was it really necessary to send two Grade 1 sorcerers?

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_243010.Text: Well, never know until we try, Ms. Mei.

Btl_CP_100_Intro_3_244010.Text: Of course. I'll do things my way.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_171010.Text: Takada's TV show is coming on. Let's hurry up and head home.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_172010.Text: Looks like you enjoyed yourself, Mai.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_173010.Text: Pretty sure I told you not to order me around, Mai.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_174010.Text: Mai, why do you always have to stir things up?

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_181010.Text: There's no one around who can give me a satisfying fight.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_182010.Text: A guy who loses like this ain't worth squat.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_183010.Text: I don't need anyone's help or orders.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_191010.Text: I'm heading home. I've got things to do.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_192010.Text: I would've been enough for this job all on my own.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_193010.Text: I'll just stick to doing things my way.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_194010.Text: You just didn't have what it takes.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_211010.Text: Good moves out there—not as good as mine, but still.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_212010.Text: Victory will surely lead to future growth.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_213010.Text: Of course. Now, make sure you win next time, too.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_214010.Text: There are plenty of tough customers out there. Remember that well.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_221010.Text: You thought that'd be enough to satisfy us?

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_222010.Text: That was one lame-ass fight you brought me to.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_223010.Text: If that's what you think, then you keep up with me.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_224010.Text: Well, guess it did kill some time.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_241010.Text: Here's to hoping we can actually spar next time.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_242010.Text: I would've been more than enough for this on my own.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_243010.Text: Hoh boy... You're one hell of a gal, Ms. Mei.

Btl_CP_100_Victory_3_244010.Text: Heh. That's all your big mouth amounted to? Lame.

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_231010.Text: You don't need to hold back, Choso.

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_232010.Text: Leave me alone, this is MY plaything.

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_233010.Text: C'mon, help me out, would you?

Btl_CP_130_Intro_3_234010.Text: It's not like you to get so serious, Choso.

Btl_CP_130_Victory_3_231010.Text: At this rate, the next battle will be easy.

Btl_CP_130_Victory_3_232010.Text: You're pretty good, Choso! I knew you had it in you.

Btl_CP_130_Victory_3_233010.Text: Oh, come on. At least pretend to be happy!

Btl_CP_130_Victory_3_234010.Text: This is no fun when it's just me by myself.

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_231010.Text: I'll turn you into ash if you slack off, Choso!

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_232010.Text: On my pride as a Curse, I won't lose here!

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_233010.Text: So what, you got a problem teaming up with me?

Btl_CP_140_Intro_3_234010.Text: Of course. Never hold back, no matter the foe.

Btl_CP_140_Victory_3_231010.Text: Hey! You were holding back, weren't you!

Btl_CP_140_Victory_3_232010.Text: Heh! I knew they'd be an easy win.

Btl_CP_140_Victory_3_233010.Text: I wouldn't complain if you cooperated from the start.

Btl_CP_140_Victory_3_234010.Text: Got no interest in getting all buddy-buddy. I'm outta here.

Btl_CP_150_Intro_3_231010.Text: Ah, you have something to protect too, don't you?

Btl_CP_150_Intro_3_232010.Text: We will give you the honor of facing us.

Btl_CP_150_Intro_3_233010.Text: I shall fight to protect the planet.

Btl_CP_150_Intro_3_234010.Text: Right you are. I won't hold back.

Btl_CP_150_Victory_3_231010.Text: Your assistance is a big help.

Btl_CP_150_Victory_3_232010.Text: Well, you're not half bad yourself, Choso.

Btl_CP_150_Victory_3_233010.Text: What a nice thing to say.

Btl_CP_150_Victory_3_234010.Text: Easier than I figured it would be.

Btl_CP_160_Intro_3_231010.Text: With the two of us together, we've as good as won.

Btl_CP_160_Intro_3_234010.Text: I'll follow your lead, elder brother.

Btl_CP_160_Victory_3_231010.Text: I knew you were strong, elder brother.

Btl_CP_160_Victory_3_233010.Text: I'll do my best for you, elder brother.

Btl_CP_160_Victory_3_234010.Text: No problem here. Same with Kechizu.

Btl_CP_051_Intro_1_011010.Text: Bring it. I'll take you on.

Btl_CP_051_Intro_1_021010.Text: If you're looking to change jobs, we'll welcome you.

Btl_CP_051_Intro_2_011010.Text: I'm saying, leave it all to me.

Btl_CP_051_Intro_2_021010.Text: Here we go. We won't lose.

Btl_CP_051_Intro_2_031010.Text: I'll end this in no time.

Btl_CP_051_Intro_3_121010.Text: Another nobody to fight? What a pain...

Btl_CP_051_Intro_3_122010.Text: I'm sure it'll be fine. We are the strongest, after all.

Btl_CP_051_Victory_2_011010.Text: I'll let you off here today.

Btl_CP_051_SpAtk_1_011010.Text: Take the Amplified and the Reversal...

Btl_CP_051_SpAtk_1_012010.Text: and smash together those two different infinities to create imaginary mass...

Btl_CP_121_Intro_1_011010.Text: I don't plan on losing, no matter whom I'm fighting.

Btl_CP_121_Intro_2_021010.Text: I can finish this right now.

Btl_CP_121_Victory_3_051010.Text: Satoru, please. Stop talking like that.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_1_011010.Text: Maybe I should go easy on you.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_1_021010.Text: How about you call it quits?

Btl_CP_170_Intro_2_011010.Text: Don't you dare hold me back.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_2_021010.Text: Go, now. I'll back you up.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_2_031010.Text: I'll finish this in no time.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_041010.Text: Careful not to get caught in the crossfire.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_042010.Text: I'll fight with you, so be grateful.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_043010.Text: You better be careful not to drag me down.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_044010.Text: Finally, we agree on something for once.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_061010.Text: Humph... Why am I with you...

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_062010.Text: I'll back you up. Just watch for friendly fire.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_063010.Text: What exactly can you do by yourself?

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_064010.Text: I'd do that without you saying anything!

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_101010.Text: Think they can take us on?

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_102010.Text: You give me more trouble than most enemies.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_103010.Text: You poor thing, going up against Todo.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_104010.Text: If you want my help, don't charge on ahead!

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_182010.Text: Support me. Without you, I'm in trouble.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_184010.Text: Then I'll make Swiss cheese out of them.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_191010.Text: Don't come crying to me if you make yourself anemic.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_192010.Text: All according to plan, right? Leave support to me.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_193010.Text: Of course! Don't you look down on me.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_194010.Text: I don't have any plans on losing, either.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_211010.Text: You're not weak. I'll leave it up to you.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_212010.Text: Hey. Let's wrap this up and head on home.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_213010.Text: Who are you kidding? I'm all good.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_214010.Text: Don't hurt yourself now. You'll just cause trouble.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_221010.Text: Make sure not to get broken, Mechamaru.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_222010.Text: I don't have time to waste on an opponent like this.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_223010.Text: You really should be careful not to underestimate me.

Btl_CP_170_Intro_3_224010.Text: Don't try me like that. Leave it to me.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_1_011010.Text: Did you enjoy yourself? I certainly did.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_2_021010.Text: A natural outcome, wouldn't you say?

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_041010.Text: Heh. Looks like victory is mine.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_042010.Text: Too bad. Who knew I'd be the last one standing.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_043010.Text: They probably underestimated me since I was fighting with you.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_044010.Text: I'd better report your unsightly behavior immediately.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_061010.Text: You could've just gone the way they did, you know.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_062010.Text: Happy to finally be away from you.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_063010.Text: Excuse me? Don't get such a big head.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_064010.Text: That's not enough to stop you, now is it?

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_101010.Text: Why do you fly on ahead every time?!

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_102010.Text: Did you really think you'd have enough to take on Todo?

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_104010.Text: What a joke! They're not even in my league.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_181010.Text: Good work. Better hurry and report back.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_182010.Text: I knew I could always count on you, Momo.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_183010.Text: We're the ones who ended up crying in the end, though.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_184010.Text: Yep, it was a good way to blow off some steam.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_191010.Text: Too bad. I thought we could have a bit more fun.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_193010.Text: You've done enough, next head of the Kamo clan. Let's report back.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_194010.Text: Of course, and shouldn't you be more worried about yourself?

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_211010.Text: Your just deserts for underestimating me.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_212010.Text: Great work. I'll be heading back, now.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_213010.Text: Well, of course. It's me we're talking about.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_214010.Text: This was hardly a challenge for me.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_221010.Text: Oopsy. Maybe I went too hard on them.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_222010.Text: We made a pretty good team, don't you think?

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_223010.Text: My, you do say the loveliest things.

Btl_CP_170_Victory_3_224010.Text: You can be happy about this, you know.

Btl_CP_170_SpAtk_1_011010.Text: Better dodge, or it'll hit you.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_1_011010.Text: Hang in there me. You're the cutest one.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_2_031010.Text: I'll give support from the air.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_041010.Text: I'll help you, but only this once.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_042010.Text: Don't worry! I'll back you up, little first-year.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_043010.Text: I know! We're gonna win this!

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_044010.Text: How childish. That's not cute at all.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_101010.Text: We'll give you the honor of facing us.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_102010.Text: Couldn't you win this on your own, Todo?

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_103010.Text: You can go as crazy as you want.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_104010.Text: You plan on rushing on in anyway, don't you?

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_172010.Text: I'll blow away the small fry with this broom.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_173010.Text: I'm ready to go anytime, Mai.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_174010.Text: Of course! Leave it to me!

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_191010.Text: Let's crush 'em with all we've got, Kamo!

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_192010.Text: I'll beat you with this broom of mine!

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_194010.Text: You're not hurt, are you, Kamo?

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_211010.Text: Don't fall asleep on the battlefield.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_212010.Text: We'll show them that we're stronger!

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_213010.Text: I'd never say no to such a sweet, little underclassman!

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_214010.Text: All right, then. Time to get pumped up!

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_222010.Text: Hey Mechamaru, you good to go?

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_223010.Text: We'll show them that they're no match for us.

Btl_CP_180_Intro_3_224010.Text: I need to finish this quickly.

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_042010.Text: You're pretty used to fights for a first-year.

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_101010.Text: Would've been tough without my backup!

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_102010.Text: Finally over... Let's hurry on back.

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_103010.Text: Your strength really bowled me over.

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_104010.Text: Well, I guess that killed some time at least.

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_171010.Text: Anyone who bullies our sweet, little underclassmen will have hell to pay.

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_172010.Text: Looks like they weren't equal to us, Mai.

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_173010.Text: My broom will get us there in a jiffy. Want a ride?

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_191010.Text: I'm glad we won, and it's all thanks to you, Kamo.

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_193010.Text: You take everything so seriously, Kamo...

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_194010.Text: I figured you had more backbone. What a shame.

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_211010.Text: Why do you think so little of us?

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_212010.Text: Nice teamwork. We'll win the next one too!

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_213010.Text: All good! Their attacks didn't even leave a scratch.

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_214010.Text: We'll win the next one, too!

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_221010.Text: That's Mechamaru for you, wrapped it up in a flash!

Btl_CP_180_Victory_3_224010.Text: For someone like me, that's nothing.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_1_021010.Text: As the next head of the Kamo clan!

Btl_CP_190_Intro_2_011010.Text: I can't afford to lose. I refuse to.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_031010.Text: This battle will make me stronger.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_032010.Text: You and I really are the same.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_034010.Text: That's a given. Let's end this quickly.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_103010.Text: As the heir to the Kamo clan, I will win this fight.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_104010.Text: Wait, Todo. We'll crush them together!

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_171010.Text: Best stay alert. They'll trip us up if we get careless.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_172010.Text: We can't afford to lose this fight. Let's win this.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_173010.Text: Never fear. I'm more than prepared. Let's go.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_174010.Text: Yeah. I'm counting on you, Mai.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_182010.Text: Nishimiya, we've got to focus here.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_183010.Text: Yes. Keep your head, and we'll win for sure.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_184010.Text: Don't rile our foes up so much, Nishimiya.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_211010.Text: Are you ready? No room for hesitation.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_212010.Text: Hardly an unbeatable foe. Let's finish this now.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_213010.Text: Very good. Then leave the rest to me.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_214010.Text: Nothing the two of us can't handle. Let's go.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_221010.Text: Go on ahead and lead us, Mechamaru.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_222010.Text: We won't hand over this win. We're going all-out.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_223010.Text: No problem. I can go anytime, Mechamaru.

Btl_CP_190_Intro_3_224010.Text: Galvanize yourself, but no being reckless.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_1_011010.Text: As if there'd be any other outcome.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_2_011010.Text: Your moves weren't bad at all.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_031010.Text: Beating an opponent of this level is nothing impressive.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_032010.Text: You've really improved. I'm looking forward to next time.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_033010.Text: I know. How about you and I spar afterwards, Fushiguro?

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_034010.Text: I've prepared for this, so I'm ready to go.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_101010.Text: Try working with your teammates a little more, Todo.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_102010.Text: It's so challenging to work with you.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_103010.Text: Hey, Todo, we haven't submitted our report yet!

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_104010.Text: It was me covering for you, after all.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_171010.Text: I will not lose, no matter the fight.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_172010.Text: That was a tough one, Mai. Are you all right?

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_173010.Text: Careful, Mai. You shouldn't be so laid-back.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_174010.Text: You're way too casual considering the battle we just had.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_181010.Text: Nishimiya, don't forget what you've learned here today.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_182010.Text: I didn't even need to get serious.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_183010.Text: Good work there, Nishimiya. We'll win the next one, too.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_184010.Text: Nice moves. Keep it up for the next one.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_211010.Text: Well, it looks like you've trained.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_212010.Text: It all went according to plan. Hope next time does, too.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_213010.Text: Your moves were quite impressive. You've really grown.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_214010.Text: Have a little more faith in yourself, Miwa.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_221010.Text: Good. Finished that faster than expected.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_222010.Text: Hmm. Seems there's still room for improvement.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_223010.Text: Yes, we won. However, it is nothing impressive.

Btl_CP_190_Victory_3_224010.Text: It's just a scratch. I'm fine.

Btl_CP_200_Intro_1_011010.Text: Go home now, and I won't kill you.

Btl_CP_200_Intro_1_021010.Text: Nothing against you, but I'll end you here.

Btl_CP_200_Victory_1_011010.Text: Your luck ran out when you became my target.

Btl_CP_200_Victory_2_011010.Text: Well, well. I think I'm getting my edge back.

Btl_CP_200_Victory_2_021010.Text: Punks like that are never a challenge.

Btl_CP_210_Intro_1_011010.Text: I will show you what I can do!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_1_021010.Text: I have no intention of handing you a win.

Btl_CP_210_Intro_2_011010.Text: I look forward to working with you!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_2_021010.Text: I'll make sure not to hold you back!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_2_031010.Text: If we're doing this, we'll aim to win!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_051010.Text: If I win, can we get a picture together?!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_052010.Text: I-I look forward to working with you!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_053010.Text: You truly are the best, Gojo! You make it look so easy!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_054010.Text: Ah, I'll try not to hold you back!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_061010.Text: They look like tough opponents. I'm getting nervous...!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_062010.Text: It's great to have you as an ally this time around!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_063010.Text: U-um, please let me handle this!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_064010.Text: No! I'm a Jujutsu Sorcerer too, after all!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_101010.Text: So, um… what's the plan, Todo?

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_102010.Text: I'm kinda scared to fight with you, Todo...

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_103010.Text: Yes! We'll win no matter what!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_104010.Text: Hey, I'm here too, you know?!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_171010.Text: Here they come! Are you ready?

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_172010.Text: I'll take care of this! Please back me up!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_173010.Text: You'll fight too, won't you, Mai? Won't you?!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_174010.Text: You shouldn't be so relaxed, Mai...!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_181010.Text: Thanks, I'm counting on you for backup!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_182010.Text: I'll show you I can handle myself, too!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_183010.Text: I won't make a blunder like that again!

Btl_CP_210_Intro_3_194010.Text: I'll do my best not to slow you down!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_1_011010.Text: Phew... We came out on top!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_2_011010.Text: Oh! Do you think this battle made me a bit stronger?

Btl_CP_210_Victory_2_021010.Text: Does this mean we have some room to breathe?

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_051010.Text: Thank you so much for the backup!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_052010.Text: So, this is the strongest Jujutsu Sorcerer of our time! Amazing!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_054010.Text: Leave this to me! ...What? The report, too?!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_061010.Text: We won somehow. That was a close one!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_062010.Text: I knew you were strong. I'm just glad you're on our side!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_064010.Text: I'll hone my skills and get even stronger!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_101010.Text: I'm so... beat...! You all right, Todo?

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_103010.Text: I knew I couldn't be like you, Todo...

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_104010.Text: This is surprising. Todo sounds almost reasonable.

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_171010.Text: I knew I could count on your backup, Mai.

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_172010.Text: Phew... That's the end of that chapter!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_173010.Text: That's right! It was rough going for a moment there, though.

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_174010.Text: Yes, good work—hey, you have to report too, Mai!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_181010.Text: We won! Are you hurt anywhere?

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_182010.Text: We won without a hitch! What a relief!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_183010.Text: Now, now, we won so all's well that ends well.

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_184010.Text: I'll do my best to contribute more!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_191010.Text: Phew, I'm glad I gave it my all!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_192010.Text: I hope I was at least of some help?

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_193010.Text: Really?! I'm glad I put in the effort!

Btl_CP_210_Victory_3_221010.Text: You can't call me useless anymore!

Btl_CP_220_Intro_2_011010.Text: If we team up, this'll be over in an instant.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_2_021010.Text: Let's do this according to plan.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_2_031010.Text: Don't get careless and fall behind.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_081010.Text: Never thought we'd be doing this together.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_082010.Text: Fine. Looks like we don't have a choice in the matter.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_083010.Text: Don't talk like you know me, you damn puppet.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_084010.Text: I'll work with you—just this once.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_101010.Text: Don't go making decisions for the both of us, Todo.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_102010.Text: Todo, please refrain from any reckless actions.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_103010.Text: Sure, I'll proceed at maximum output.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_104010.Text: True. We won't know until we try.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_171010.Text: Hey, careful not to leave any openings, Mai.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_172010.Text: With my attacks and your projectiles, we'll win this.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_173010.Text: Don't worry. I won't make the same mistake again.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_174010.Text: All we have to do is finish this quickly.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_181010.Text: No holding back. Victory shall be ours.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_183010.Text: Of course, I'll attack with all I've got.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_184010.Text: Not a problem. Proceeding at maximum output.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_192010.Text: This may be a tough opponent. Get ready to go all out.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_193010.Text: Got it. We'll win this one.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_194010.Text: Of course. Cranking output to maximum.

Btl_CP_220_Intro_3_212010.Text: Leave this to me. I'll send them packing.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_082010.Text: You're stronger than you were at the exchange event.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_083010.Text: We're done here. Don't act so familiar.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_084010.Text: Humph. I'll take my leave, then.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_101010.Text: You are quite the free spirit, aren't you...

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_102010.Text: Hm. That was a good match, don't you agree?

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_103010.Text: I've had enough, personally. We should report in.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_104010.Text: For once, I agree with you, Todo.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_171010.Text: Your aim has gotten even better, Mai.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_172010.Text: I knew we would win from the get-go.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_173010.Text: Every battle should be taken seriously, yes?

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_174010.Text: Yes, please keep up the good work.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_181010.Text: To think someone that weak would try taking us on...

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_182010.Text: Mission accomplished. You were quite helpful, Nishimiya.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_184010.Text: No problem. I can repair it right away.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_191010.Text: Humph, so this is as far as we go this time.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_192010.Text: It's over. You all right, Kamo?

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_193010.Text: This will make finishing the report a breeze.

Btl_CP_220_Victory_3_194010.Text: You're right. Let's keep this up.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_1_011010.Text: As an older brother, I cannot lose this fight.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_1_021010.Text: I will protect my younger brothers.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_2_011010.Text: I'll kill anyone who hurts my siblings.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_2_021010.Text: I'll end anyone who gets in our way.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_2_031010.Text: I'll take on my siblings' enemies.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_131010.Text: Tell me... Why do I have to fight you?

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_132010.Text: I'll show you an older brother's might.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_133010.Text: I don't care. I just have to fight as a big brother.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_134010.Text: Humph, don't be an idiot. I don't cut corners.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_142010.Text: Do we have to actually fight?

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_143010.Text: All right, just stay out of my way.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_144010.Text: Tch. Don't drag me into this just because of that.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_151010.Text: Do you also have something you want to protect?

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_152010.Text: If we have to fight, then we must win.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_153010.Text: Yes, I'd do anything to protect my brothers.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_154010.Text: Fine. I'll help you out a little.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_161010.Text: You won't lay a finger on my brothers!

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_162010.Text: Let an older brother show you how it's done.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_163010.Text: Hmph... No opponent stands a chance against us.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_164010.Text: Any enemy of us siblings can't be allowed to live.

Btl_CP_230_Intro_3_011010.Text: No, that's not true. I'm your big brother.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_1_011010.Text: We don't bear the same burdens.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_2_011010.Text: For the sake of my siblings, I can't lose here.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_2_021010.Text: Did you really think that'd be enough to take me on?

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_132010.Text: You could've handled this on your own.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_133010.Text: Okay. Fight on your own, next time.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_141010.Text: I beat our enemy. You don't get to complain.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_142010.Text: It's over, right? I'm going home.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_144010.Text: I just had good backup, that's all.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_151010.Text: You were easier to work with than the others.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_153010.Text: Don't get it twisted. I didn't do it for you.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_154010.Text: I just did what an older brother should.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_161010.Text: There's no way I'll lose in front of my brother!

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_162010.Text: Eso, Kechizu... You two all right?

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_163010.Text: I am strong because my brothers are here.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_164010.Text: If it's for my family, I'll strike down anyone I need to.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_011010.Text: Don't think you can win against us brothers.

Btl_CP_230_Victory_3_012010.Text: No matter what, you're my brother, Yuji.

Btl_CP_240_Intro_1_011010.Text: We wouldn't want to get careless, right, Ui Ui?

Btl_CP_240_Intro_2_021010.Text: You can do as you like.

Btl_CP_240_Intro_3_011010.Text: Do whatever you like. I'll be sure to keep up.

Btl_CP_240_Intro_3_012010.Text: Show me what you're capable of, Itadori.

Btl_CP_240_Intro_3_013010.Text: This is quite expensive. Want to touch it?

Btl_CP_240_Intro_3_014010.Text: Hehe, I look forward to the next opportunity, Itadori.

Btl_CP_240_Intro_3_101010.Text: It might be a bit boring for you, Mr. Todo.

Btl_CP_240_Intro_3_102010.Text: Do as you wish. I assume that was always the plan, anyway.

Btl_CP_240_Intro_3_103010.Text: I don't care either way. I'd take the easy way out if it meant more money.

Btl_CP_240_Intro_3_104010.Text: Humph. Your concern is unwarranted, Mr. Todo.

Btl_CP_240_Intro_3_051010.Text: It costs money to make me wait, you know.

Btl_CP_240_Intro_3_052010.Text: Heh heh. I have high hopes.

Btl_CP_240_Victory_1_011010.Text: Seems you need to work on that judgment of yours.

Btl_CP_240_Victory_2_021010.Text: I'll praise you for your guts, at least.

Btl_CP_240_Victory_3_011010.Text: I'm looking forward to the next one, Itadori.

Btl_CP_240_Victory_3_012010.Text: Good work, Itadori. Still in one piece, I hope?

Btl_CP_240_Victory_3_013010.Text: I can't wait to see how far you go, Itadori.

Btl_CP_240_Victory_3_014010.Text: I think you're plenty strong already.

Btl_CP_240_Victory_3_101010.Text: Thanks for the game. I have to be going now, Mr. Todo.

Btl_CP_240_Victory_3_102010.Text: Hehe, you chose the wrong person to pick a fight with.

Btl_CP_240_Victory_3_103010.Text: Heh, just go easy on me when the time comes, okay?

Btl_CP_240_Victory_3_104010.Text: I quite enjoyed myself, thanks to you.

Btl_CP_250_SpAtk_1_011010.Text: Let's turn this up a notch!

Btl_CP_270_Intro_1_011010.Text: Show me what you're capable of.

Btl_CP_270_Intro_1_021010.Text: I don't mind putting in effort as long as there's booze involved.

Btl_CP_270_Intro_2_011010.Text: At the very least, don't drag me down with you.

Btl_CP_270_Intro_2_021010.Text: I'll wrap this up in a second!

Btl_CP_270_Intro_2_031010.Text: Anyone who can't take the heat gets left behind.

Btl_CP_270_Intro_3_061010.Text: You're only going to slow me down in this fight.

Btl_CP_270_Intro_3_062010.Text: Lose focus and you'll lose it all.

Btl_CP_270_Intro_3_063010.Text: Go home? I should be saying that to you, Maki.

Btl_CP_270_Intro_3_064010.Text: Humph, don't come crying to me when it stings.

Btl_CP_270_Victory_1_011010.Text: This is no trouble at all.

Btl_CP_270_Victory_2_021010.Text: To think we'd face such a challenge.

Btl_CP_270_Victory_3_061010.Text: I was hoping for more of a challenge.

Btl_CP_270_Victory_3_062010.Text: I might've gone a little overboard.

Btl_CP_270_Victory_3_063010.Text: Humph, let's see how long you can keep this up.

Btl_CP_270_Victory_3_064010.Text: Hm? Did you say something, Maki?

Btl_CP_270_SpAtk_1_011010.Text: Do you know how many frames go into a single second of animation?

Btl_CP_270_SpAtk_1_012010.Text: Upping resolution and frame rate is the trend.

Btl_CP_270_SpAtk_1_013010.Text: 4K this, and 60 frames per second that.

Btl_CN_200_TagAtk_1_012010.Text: Am I... Am I... Am I...

Btl_CN_210_Intro_1_011010.Text: It's sure to be an overwhelming victory!

Btl_CN_210_Intro_1_021010.Text: I can't wait to see Sis's beautiful fighting!

Btl_CN_210_Intro_2_021010.Text: Don't stand in Mei Mei's way.

Btl_CN_210_Victory_1_011010.Text: It's no use, Big Sister won't ever lose.

Btl_CN_210_Victory_2_011010.Text: That's what happens when you underestimate Sis.

Btl_CN_210_Victory_2_021010.Text: Aw, Sis! You're just too nice!
